case_title: MILTON KATZ VS. ELISCO VIEDAS VIZCARRA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MILTON KATZ FILED BY PLAINTIFF KATZ, MILTON
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-19-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-15-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY KATZ, MILTON AS TO DEFENDANT VIZCARRA, ELISCO VIEDAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AMANDA FISCHER. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
